column1: # subject:   No issuse: Added KB benchmarking code
# Times are milliseconds for query build + execution via KnowledgeBaseServiceImpl.read()
# (the read-only result cache is bypassed). LOCAL knowledge bases run against an embedded
# repository (network-noise-free); REMOTE ones hit public SPARQL endpoints and their timings
# are dominated by network/server load - trust the medians and re-measure baseline+after
# - DBpedia (German) "labelContaining" is throttled by the endpoint ("HTTP 429 Too Many
#   Requests") for the heavy bif:contains+regex query
# - AGROVOC only defines labelPrefix test data
column2: so it has no child/parent operations.
